= Other Facility Type CHAR 1
FAC_DESC FAC_DESC CCN Facility Type Description Description of the facility. New data field beginning in 2017; blank for prior years. This field will be blank in the preliminary version of the file. CHAR 105
SPEC PRVDR_SPCLTY_CD Provider Specialty Code CMS specialty code associated with the NPI as recorded in PECOS. A specialty code was not found for a small number of NPIs, in which case the SPEC field is blank. CHAR 2
ACO_Loc ACO_LOCATION ACO Location (county
